# twitchan.com — for LLMs

> Lightweight, multilingual adult video gallery. 18+ only.

## Purpose
twitchan.com aggregates video metadata from the **official Hentai Ocean API** (`https://hentaiocean.com/api`) and embeds videos via the official Embed API (`<iframe src="https://hentaiocean.com/embed/{slug}?la=1">`). The site does not host media files — all video playback happens through the source site's iframe embed.

## Data source
This site uses the official public API provided by Hentai Ocean. No HTML scraping. Endpoints used:
- `GET /api?action=recent` — JSON array of all 213 videos (id, urlname, videoname, description, dates, coverimg, recentrelease)
- `GET /api?action=hentai&slug={slug}` — full video info + genres
- `GET /embed/{slug}?la=1` — iframe-embeddable player (`?la=1` = reduced ads)
- `GET /thumbnail/{slug}.webp` — 16:9 video thumbnail
- `GET /assets/cover/{coverimg}` — DVD cover image
- `GET /watch/{slug}` — source video page (for download link)

The API is documented and provided by Hentai Ocean for building third-party websites ("create your own hentai website or project using the Hentai Ocean API").

## Anonymous visitor encryption
Each visitor gets a random 128-bit ID generated client-side (stored in localStorage). The ID is HMAC-SHA256 signed server-side (using `VISITOR_SIGN_KEY` env var), producing a 30-day token. Only the SHA-256 hash of the visitor ID is stored on the server (for view deduplication) — the raw ID never leaves the browser unencrypted. No PII (name, email, IP) is collected.

## Audience
Adults 18+ only. The site uses an age gate on first visit and is labeled with RTA-5042 metadata.

## Languages
18 languages auto-selected by visitor IP geolocation: English, 日本語, 中文, 한국어, Español, Français, Deutsch, Português, Русский, Italiano, العربية, हिन्दी, ไทย, Tiếng Việt, Bahasa Indonesia, Türkçe, Polski, Nederlands. Manual override is always available in the header.

## Main features
- Grid gallery with 15 items per page (infinite scroll via "Next" button)
- In-site iframe video player (loads Hentai Ocean's official embed with `?la=1` reduced ads)
- Download button opens the source page in a new tab
- Search by title
- Native responsive ads every 15 items
- Mobile floating ad
- 300x100 mobile banner
- 308x286 video ad inside the player
- Hidden admin panel at `/?p=admin` (4-segment password)
  - Add single by URL (calls HO API to fetch metadata)
  - Bulk add (one URL per line)
  - Full catalog scrape via `GET /api?action=recent` (213 videos)
  - Clear all media
- Anonymous visitor encryption (HMAC-SHA256 signed tokens)

## Tech
Next.js 16 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind 4. No database — uses JSON seed file (`data/media.json`) + Netlify Blobs for admin-added items. Visitor tokens are stateless HMAC-signed. Deployed on Netlify with Netlify Functions handling the admin auth gate.

## Content policy
All media is sourced from Hentai Ocean via their official public API. We do not host, store, or cache media — only embed via iframe. Takedown requests are honored — see /?p=policy.

## Important URLs
- Home: https://twitchan.com/
- About: https://twitchan.com/?p=about
- Policy: https://twitchan.com/?p=policy
- Sitemap: https://twitchan.com/api/sitemap
- Robots: https://twitchan.com/api/robots
- Admin: https://twitchan.com/?p=admin (password-protected)
